programme.desc: The roommates settle in to life at the shore, Deena copes with being away from her boyfriend and Nicole makes an announcement that shocks the house. (S6, ep2)

programme.desc: Jenni plans a 'Shore Shower' for Nicole and invites all the roommates. The guys support Mike's decision to dump Paula and tag along for a front row seat to all the action. (S6, ep9)

programme.desc: MVP is back, resulting in a near threesome for Vinny. The girls struggle to keep the baby shower a surprise for Nicole, and Vinny is nervous about Jionni seeing him at the party. (S6, ep10)

programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: The Meatballs hold auditions to find a temporary party pal for Deena. Mike reveals to the roommates that he used to be a stripper and they coax him into showing his stuff. (S6, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101

programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 18

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 6

programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: There has been a spate of shark attacks off the beaches near Perth. The State Government has put down drum lines to catch the sharks responsible. But the cull has killed over 40 Tiger sharks and not the sharks responsible for the attacks.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Julia is led on an exhausting and not so merry chase by one of the world's most dangerous snakes.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Julia comes to the aid of a dehydrated python who needs to be taken to the RSPCA, and there's a remarkable confrontation between a Keelback and a highly poisonous cane toad.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Makos are the sports cars of the shark world. Riley, with Hawaiian shark conservationist Ocean Ramsey, is on a mission out to the blue water off the east coast of New Zealand in search of this stunning animal.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Julia confronts her fear on heights while trying to wrangle a massive carpet python. Meanwhile, Johnny Must try to catch two of them. Later Julia has a close call with the worlds second deadliest snake.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tiger sharks are responsible for the second most attacks on humans. Do they actively prey on humans at beaches, or are these just chance encounters?

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Julia will be cooped up with a massive eastern brown, while Bonny gets her first taste of snake hunting, and Johnny ultimately makes his biggest catch yet.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Fiji has something extraordinary  a shark marine reserve. How did this come about, what does this mean for Fiji and for the sharks in the reserve? Riley's headed to Beqa Lagoon in Fiji to find out.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dive in to the Sea of Cortez to see the wonder of an underwater mountain as Gordon and his crew scour it for the elusive schools of hammerhead sharks.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Focused on helping a pregnant, wounded lioness, an unarmed South African conservationist unwittingly ends up face-to-face with one of the pride's aggressive, young males. During his Zambezi River adventure, a pilot is attacked by a hungry hyena.

programme.title: Diving with Sharks: The Ultimate Guide
programme.desc: Filmmakers Emma and Andy Casagrande are on a quest to dive into the ocean with Nature's largest predatory sharks; from the great white as seen in the movie "Jaws" to sleek tigers, in the Caribbean Sea, the Wild Pacific ocean, Hawaii, and the Galapagos.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Julia saves a karate school from a highly venomous visitor. Meanwhile, Johnny Bagpipes leaves his lady flying solo as he prepares to fly to Rome.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia in looking for the rainbow at the end of the python. She goes to show first responders how to handle snakes. Johnny helps a snake in a treacherous situation.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On a camping trip in the Canadian wilderness, a family is unwittingly stalked by a hungry and opportunistic wolf. A mountain bike excursion in California becomes a life-and-death struggle when a cyclist is pounced and attacked upon by a 110 pound cougar.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been called upon to handle the delicate matter of moving an adult ragged tooth shark from one aquarium to another.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Right at the southern end of New Zealand we find Stewart Island, home to the Great White Shark. Locals are convinced that the shark cage operators are attracting the sharks in, putting them at risk when fishing and diving.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: People are jumping into cages and getting up close to big, hungry sharks. But what happens when you purposely attract these animals?

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia is put to the test trying to catch on of Australia's fastest snakes. Barry gives Julia a tough decision to make. A keelback is on the loose. Finally, Johnny and Julia are faced with a grim situation.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Julia rescues a policeman from an unwelcome intruder. Johnny gets to go up against a venomous snake all on his own. And Julia gets to go explore at night in a leech infested forest.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's touch and go for a python that has been attacked by two dogs; Johnny's artistic side is ignited, and Julia tries to control some misbehaving kids.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Riley has a fear of stingrays. Like many people the death of Croc Hunter Steve Irwin led him to believe that stingrays are dangerous animals. But are they? To find out and to challenge his fear, Riley heads out to meet a bunch of stingrays.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia will get a love-bite from her favorite snake, Bonny the dog continues her snake detection training, and then there's a deadly wrangle with a juvenile eastern brown.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Julia rescues a terrified Russian rapper from a neighborhood "gangster", Johnny finds himself in a tug of war with a python and bonny gets her first shot looking for snakes in the field.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Because of its isolated habitat, little is known about the Galapagos shark and its behaviors. And that’s enough to get Shark Gordon interested.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We meet a teenager who suddenly loses control of his lower body; a family overshadowed by a sinister condition, and a man whose features never stopped growing.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Louise and her husband endured a six year struggle to conceive.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tammy Gilleland thought she the flu she mysteriously ends up paralyzed from the chest down. Nadine Miller's world is slowly disappearing before her eyes as an unknown illness pushes her into blindness

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After moving houses, and months of strange behaviour, 11 year old Sammy stops walking and only hops, the doctors are the only hope to discover the cause of his bizarre symptoms.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lonnie's dreams of playing in the NFL are destroyed when boils develop on his head.Plus, Theresa suffers sight loss during her pregnancy, physicians struggle to find a diagnosis.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: 23-year-old motorcyclist Richard is rushed into A&E by helicopter, having collided with a parked car at speed. Flung through the air, he hit a car's bonnet before landing face down on the pavement.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: From zero-hours contracts to long working hours, this episode explores how the emergency services deal with issues arising from rising levels of stress and anxiety in the workplace.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: By the time Adrian is in high school his right leg weighs 68kg and limits his mobility. Kathy is struggling to treat a rash and is experiencing weight loss. Can doctors help?

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: 75-year-old Graham is brought in to A&E having been the victim of a random attack - he's been stabbed in the neck with a pair of scissors by a stranger on his doorstep.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: After a rollercoaster struggle with infertility, Jody and Chris arrive to give birth.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: 47-year-old Gary was on his motorcycle when he had a head-on collision with a car. The single father of two is a code red trauma and is being flown fifty miles to King's by air ambulance.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Being unable to control labour heightens first time mum Natasha's anxiety.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After their last child was stillborn, childhood sweethearts feel nervous and guilty about trying again.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: A baby continuously gets bruises and spots all over her body. Then, a tiny scratch causes excessive bleeding and her parents are very concerned. The doctors do what they can to find out what is wrong.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: 38-year-old Stacie is transferred to King's early in the morning after falling out of a tree onto her head at a friend's all-night divorce party.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Focusing on immigration issues in Cheshire, this episode features a heated arrest at a supermarket and the rise in racially-aggravated incidents during weekends.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: With over 300 people losing their homes every day, the number of people sleeping rough in the UK has doubled in six years. This episode explores the impact of homelessness on Wiltshire Police.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John was on his way to work when he came off his motorbike and struck a bollard, injuring his shoulder. Frances, his partner of twenty-four years, is abroad and John doesn't want to spoil her holiday.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A mother rushes her toddler to hospital when she loses the ability to walk or stand. Plus, a runner tries to sleep off a numbness in his foot, but finds the sensation spreading.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode explores emergency services’ increasing role in dealing with issues arising from mental health problems.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: This episode explores the impact of mother-son relationships that break down, and the deadly toll that can arise from these situations.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 31 year old Jen thought she'd grow old alone and never be a mother.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This episode explores the lives of people who the police and paramedics regularly meet, from persistent shoplifters to struggling alcoholics.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency? S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: This episode explores the role of emergency services when matters of the heart clash with the law.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: 12-year-old Eddie is brought into A&E by ambulance after being hit by a car on his way home from school. Eddie's head 'bullseyed' the windscreen and he was thrown before landing on the pavement.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: When Jeanne fails to hit puberty, doctors discover that something is terribly wrong. Also, Mary is stricken with a collapsed lung and breathing problems.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 2

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, country music star Tyler Farr teaches Rob, Chanel, and Sterling the healing power of "Redneck Therapy," how-to "Suffer In Peace" and what it means to have "Outside Junk."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 819
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Tonight on Ridiculousness, comedian Eric Andre returns to check out some "Power Dicks", watch people go tongue to tongue in the category "Unexpected Mouth Mates" and get sticky with his favorite dressing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Olympic Gold Medalist Kaitlyn Farrington joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about "Other Sochi Games", "Pokeaphobia" and what it means to be a "Virgin Larper".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 423
programme.desc: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.desc: The roommates move into their new home, and hot tub drinks lead to a racial breakthrough make-out.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Daria is approached by two imaginary friends to get Christmas, Halloween, and Guy Fawkes Day to return to Holiday Island, and Helen and Jake get struck by Cupid's arrow.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After Lawndale's cyber cafe is robbed, Mr. O'Neill convinces Daria, Jane and the other students to raise funds to reopen the coffeehouse.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Becker arrives at the diner on Valentine’s Day, he is displeased to find wall-to-wall make-out sessions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is upset when he learns that his ex-wife has written a pop-psychology book starring him as "Angry Man."

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker yells at a woman for letting her child cry uncontrollably, then rants about her bad parenting skills.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Becker is outraged as he tells the gang at the diner that someone broke into his apartment and stole his computer.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: John has an unusual run of good luck...and he doesn't trust it.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggie's love life.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker starts a secretive new health regime to lower his cholesterol, which leads people to talk about his unknown condition. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is arrested for being confrontational and forced to do community service and Bob moves in with Linda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Jake goes on a date with a blind girl and Margaret is confronted by the fact that one of her patients doesn't like her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 22

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 23

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 2

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Becker S3 Ep. 4

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy debates her future with Sam after learning the heart-breaking news that Marlo is pregnant with his baby.

programme.title: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Home Run
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Jesse and Susan are on their way to Mount Carmel for a romantic getaway weekend but detour to a fishing town when their car breaks down. They grab a bite at the local diner when Susan sees a man she used to know.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When resident Paul Brewer is killed, it's the second murder in a month at the exclusive gated community, Hillview Estates. With no leads on the killer, Steve goes undercover as Dr. Steve Brewer, a community resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Personal grievances get in the way of detective Harry Trumble's retirement party. Trumble never forgave Dr. Sloan for marrying his college sweetheart and dedicated his life to his work.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr. Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 20
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Sloan is caught between family and professional loyalties as his brother Stacy, and medical student Daniel, are both implicated in a mysterious series of events that end in an accidental death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Steve responds to a call where earlier a man chased another man out of a store with a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Dr. Wesley, Dean of the medical school, is arrested for sale of narcotics, she pleads her innocence to Mark. Meanwhile, Mark's student Quinn and neighbor Jennifer plan to marry.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 5
programme.desc: In a grueling physical challenge, one castaway takes a hard fall that results in an injury so severe that it threatens to take him out of the game for good.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Heroes tribe continues to struggle in an effort to get their priorities straight. A division threatens to tear the tribe apart and send one of their strongest players home.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 7
programme.desc: With plenty to prove to his tribe, one castaway knows that he’s been given a last chance. Will he finally come through for the team?

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Both tribes find themselves eagerly anticipating the merge and arrive at the Reward Challenge ready for a big announcement. Struggling to keep their tribe in tact, the Heroes vow to work together to ensure that they outlast the Villains.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Reeling from the loss of an ally, one castaway scrambles to secure votes, fearing that she might be the next target. The Heroes develop a risky strategy in an effort to align themselves with one of the game’s most notorious players.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A Hero finds himself taking a gamble and placing trust in one of the game’s most notorious villains, despite objections from his wary alliance.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the wake of a game-changing Tribal Council, everyone struggles to find their place in the newly merged tribe and some panicked players consider making new allies in an effort to regain control of the game.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reeling from the departure of their ally, two castaways are forced to rethink their plans now that their alliance has been shattered.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The final six get the chance to earn time with their loved ones in a fiercely fought reward challenge. One castaway makes a surprising choice that sends ripples through the tribe and threatens to cost someone the million dollar prize.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 14
programme.desc: One castaway lets paranoia get the best of him as he targets a loyal ally. As the final tribal council draws near, everyone struggles to stay on top of their game as alliances crumble and everyone starts to play the game for themselves.

programme.title: Survivor US S20 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A one-hour live reunion.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 12 everyday Aussies take on 12 Australian Champions to see who can outwit, outplay & outlast to become the Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Only a few days on the island and alliances are already starting to form. It's still a team game as the rewards challenge requires a huge effort from all in order to take home some fishing equipment.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After a loss at the Immunity Challenge, one tribe will contemplate a major betrayal in order to rid the game of one of its most powerful players.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Contenders play hard in the challenges, desperate to prove they've got what it takes to win. Tensions are high at Tribal Council with one player taken down in an epic blindside and sent home.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Strategic game play is underway as one of the contestants finds an idol and needs to decide fast who can be trusted. Paranoia sets in at Tribal Council with confusion and panic taking over.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paranoia starts to set in across both tribes with rumours of contestants having idols â€“ but are they real or fake? At Tribal Council, the tribe are faced with some big questions around leadership.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: There are shake ups all over for both The Contenders and The Champions. Will old alliances will be broken?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Who is controlling the game? Will their antics soon be uncovered? Will they fall victim to their own success or are they still calling the shots?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In camp, plans start to unravel leading to an epic Tribal Council no one saw coming and that leaves everyone shocked.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Tribe members have been given a wake up call and it's clear to everyone that it's every man for himself in the game of Survivor.
