programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Things kick off in the house as Aaron hears Vicky and the girls slagging him off on the eve of his third date with Vicky. (S8,ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: New boy Kyle gets properly settled into the house by spending the night with Holly, and the Geordies take Tash on Tours international as they jet off to Reykjavik, Iceland for some partying. (S8, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: Will Aaron and Marnie finally get together, and will Scott and Gary make up? Meanwhile, Charlotte and Holly announce Geordie Shore's first-ever wedding. (S8, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't go to Heidi and Spencer's housewarming party.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren and Heidi grow even farther apart when Spencer asks Heidi to marry him.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren tries to help Audrina decide if Justin is boyfriend material.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Heidi takes her fiancé Spencer to meet her family in Colorado.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi's social circle shrinks as Spencer breaks up with Brody for hanging out with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lauren gets a blast from the past when her ex-boyfriend Jason calls.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren's feelings for Jason are rekindled, but when they run into Heidi and Spencer, tempers flare.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Lauren is shocked to learn that Jason has a girlfriend, but Jason has a bigger surprise for her.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Shelly Sun, the co-founder and CEO of BrightStar Care, travels to the frontlines of her company, and becomes overwhelmed while assisting a caregiver. When her husband and co-founding partner, joins her, he finds that Bingo is nothing to play with.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Tim White, the Chancellor of the University of California, Riverside, is put to the test when his role as a teaching assistant is graded by over 200 chemistry students. Later, his physical aptitude is under exam while working with the track team.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International, one of the largest timeshare companies in the world, ignites a fire on a dangerous assignment and breaks his cover at a job site.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dina Dwyer-Owens, Chairman and CEO of the Dwyer Group, embarks on a grueling undercover experience where she works as a plumber, hauls water heaters, fixes ovens and works alongside a grounds crew.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Rick Tigner, President of Kendall-Jackson Wine Estates, causes a shutdown when he struggles to maintain pace on a bottling line, and is shocked by comments made by a delivery driver.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Rick Silva, President and CEO of Checkers & Rally's, one of the nation's largest fast food chains, travels to the front lines of his industry, where he's forced to make a drastic decision regarding one of his restaurants.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bernt Bodal, CEO of American Seafoods, one of the largest seafood companies in the U.S., realizes that despite his past experience as a deckhand, he's not prepared to return to the tough work and dangers involved in a day's work on a fishing vessel.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lynne Zappone, Chief Talent Officer of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen, the world's second-largest fried chicken restaurant chain, is frustrated with an employee's lack of Southern charm behind the counter.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam Taylor, CEO of Oriental Trading Company, is concerned when he discovers some of his employees aren't happy. Meanwhile, the Boss causes an unintentional shutdown in his plant when he's tasked with managing the assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Harlan Kent, President and CEO of Yankee Candle, the leading designer, manufacturer, wholesaler and retailer of premium scented candles, goes undercover where his customer service skills leave several co-workers questioning his true identity.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mark King, President and CEO of TaylorMade Golf Company, the largest manufacturer of golf equipment and apparel in the world, is forced to break cover when an employee grows suspicious of her new trainee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chad Hallock, CEO and Co-Founder of Budget Blinds, the largest window coverings franchise in North America with more than 800 franchise locations, takes it personally when two separate franchisees criticize his advertising plan.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dan DiZio, CEO and Co-Founder of the Philly Pretzel Factory, which sells over 100 million pretzels a year throughout its 120 stores, is forced into action after one franchisee goes rogue.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Catherine Monson, CEO of FASTSIGNS International, who has never designed or installed one of their signs, finds herself plagued by air bubbles while trying to affix large decal signs, and is also forced to conquer her fear of heights.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Jose Mas, CEO of MasTec, one of the largest builders of telecommunication and energy systems in North America, receives an explosive surprise while heading down a manhole.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Mitchell B. Modell, CEO of Modell's Sporting Goods, gets some major league advice from New York Yankee's pitcher CC Sabathia before beginning his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Ron Lynch, President of Tilted Kilt, a Celtic-themed sports bar and restaurant, goes undercover in his own company, he discovers one Kilt Girl crossing the line with customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As our youngest boss featured in the series at age 34, Kat Cole, President of Cinnabon, Inc. discovers a couple of employees who share her zealous work ethic.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Stephen J. Cloobeck, Chairman and CEO of Diamond Resorts International obtains a new chain of resort properties, he goes on an undercover mission for a second time.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum, CEO and Co-Founder of PostNet, the fastest-growing design, printing, copying and shipping franchise, dons a drastic disguise for his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lorne Abony, CEO and Chairman of Mood Media, faces his fear of heights when he has to climb a tall ladder to install equipment during his undercover mission.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Jim Rogers, Chairman and CEO of Kampgrounds of America Inc., the world's largest system of family friendly franchised and company-owned campgrounds, faces his fears when he must zip line while undercover at a KOA site.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Paul Damico, President of Moe's Southwest Grill, has to bite his tongue after realizing one of his restaurant supervisors is being pushy and rude to the line workers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf, the Chief Brand Officer of Boston Market, joins UNDERCOVER BOSS for the first time, when she makes the crucial decision to terminate an employee who makes disparaging remarks about customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Toby Bost, CEO of O'Neill Clothing, USA, one of the largest surf wear and active lifestyle brands, is put in a difficult position when an employee's casual attitude crosses the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Andy Wirth, President, and CEO of Squaw Valley and Alpine Meadows, two ski resorts located in Lake Tahoe, ventures to the top of an unsafe cliff to post warning signs while training with a ski patrol.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Fatburger, a “fast casual” restaurant famous for their made-to-order burgers, takes drastic measures when he learns that employees at one franchise location are facing payroll issues and working with broken equipment.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 69

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 79

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 87

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 25

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 89

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S7 Ep. 75

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 76
programme.desc: When a bank teller arrived at her parent's home the gunmen were already there. The robbers held her family hostage and forced her to empty a bank vault. If she didn't comply she could lose everyone she loved.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 93
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 20

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S3 Ep. 25

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 19

programme.title: The FBI Files S5 Ep. 75

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 118

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S4 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S8 Ep. 98
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear  kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 114
programme.desc: In the 70s and 80s a gang of thugs wreaked havoc on the island of Puerto Rico. Organized, experienced and deadly they seemed beyond the reach of the law.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 89
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 39
programme.desc: A report about three Texas housewives, Tammye Markle, Joni Shannon, and Tina Wiley, who call themselves the "Facebook Detectives" and who used the Internet to try to find their friend Lisa Stone, who disappeared from her Dallas home in June 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 60
programme.desc: In October of 2009, 20-year-old Noor Almaleki and Amal Khalaf, the mother of her boyfriend Marwan, walked out of a Peoria, Arizona DES office and were struck by an SUV driven by Noor's father and Iraqi immigrant, Faleh Hassan Almaleki.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report on the murders of Philip Heidt and his son Carey, the shooting of Philip's wife, Linda, and the secret extra-marital affair of Carey's wife Robin with his brother Craig, who has been convicted of the murders of his father and his brother.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report about Harold Landry, a self-made millionaire who left behind his life in Louisiana to pursue a romance with a British woman he met online, and how this seemingly perfect relationship ended when Lucy Landry was murdered at their home in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report on the hunt for a serial killer suspected of murdering three young women from Los Angeles, California to Chicago, Illinois.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 49
programme.desc: A report on Canadian filmmaker Mark Twitchell, whose obsession with the Showtime television series "Dexter" turned to reality and led to murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 27
programme.desc: A report on the case of Anthony Graves, who spent eighteen years -- twelve of them on death row -- in a Texas prison for murders he did not commit.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 36
programme.desc: A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: 48 Hours S24 Ep. 57
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 31
programme.desc: On November 29, 2005, firemen put out a fire in a house in Morgantown, West Virginia -- and discovered the charred remains of Jimmy Michael and his wife Shelly. A medical examiner’s report found that Jimmy was dead before the blaze had even started.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Detective Scott Dudek of the Alameda County Sheriff's Office was attempting to establish the identity of a teenage girl whose body was found in a trash bag left behind a restaurant in California.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 63
programme.desc: In 2002, 11-year-old Shawn Hornbeck was kidnapped while riding his bicycle in his hometown of Richwoods, Missouri. Over the course of the next four and a half years, he was held captive and sexually abused by his abductor, Michael Devlin.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 45
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Jeanette Louise Zapata, who mysteriously vanished without a trace from her home in Wisconsin on October 11, 1976, leaving behind her daughter Linda, and two other children.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A report on the death of 50-year-old Kathy Augustine, a career politician from Nevada. Questions arose about the cause of her death after police received a tip that she may have been poisoned, and toxicology reports further confirmed it.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 41
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 69
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 53
programme.desc: A report on the September 3, 2006 disappearance of Nina Reiser, a Russian doctor who had married Hans Reiser, an American computer whiz. Their marriage began to fall apart and Nina began an affair with Sean Sturgeon, Hans' best friend.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 57
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A report on the cold cases of two young women, both new to the areas where they lived, who were both raped and murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 22

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential AU S1 Ep. 8

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8

When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.desc: Anti-Poof: For every fairy, there’s an anti-fairy – thus anti-Poof is born – FOOP! It’s up to Poof to stop this anti-fairy from destroying Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Scary GodCouple: Foop becomes Vicky’s anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Hall Monitor/Harold's Bar Mitzvah: When it's time for Helga to step down as Hall Monitor, Helga chooses Phoebe as her replacement. Helga assumes that Phoebe will let Helga maintain the extra perks which come with the assignment.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Bored Identity/Country Clubbed: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad’s life was like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Rain keeps Reggie from training for the Triathlon, so she joins in some kitchen-destroying mayhem with Otto. Tired of Reggie's bossy attitude, Twister and Otto make fun of her when she wipes out.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mission: Responsible/Hair-i-cane: Cosmo and Wanda are exhausted from taking care of their baby, so Timmy volunteers to take over and give them a night out on the town./Timmy wishes up indestructible hair with personality that can never be cut!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Steely Phil/Quantity Time: Arnold trains Grandpa to take on his old Chinese checkers nemesis, Robby Fisher. Miriam decides to visit her mother after learning that Big Bob and Helga are on vacation at the same time.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Arnold becomes a hot (and dangerous) hitter. He keeps injuring people every time he swings the bat. Afraid of hurting more people, Arnold refuses to play ball. / Arnold and Gerald manage the career of the unlikely country-and-western singer, Mr. Hyunh.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: King Chang/The End of the Universe-ity: Shya! Mark Chang is called back to Yugopotamia to become king while his father, under attack from a mystery assailant, flees for his life. Dark Laser’s back and tries to make Timmy his apprentice!

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Counting on the natural beaver reflex to dam running water, the government air-drops Norb and Dag into a flood zone.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 69
programme.desc: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him altogether.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A monster storm washes the Beavers out of their dam and strands them in a scary Dixieland bayou.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Terrible Twosome/App Trap: Poof goes through the terrible twos. Foop goes through the terrific twos. Timmy and his fairies have to survive Poof’s terrible twos.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A record heatwave strikes the city, setting everyone on edge./Arnold wakes to find the city covered in snow and hears that school is closed for the day.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Operation: Ruthless/The Vacant Lot: Arnold decides to get up the nerve to speak with the girl of his dreams, Ruth McDougal, at the annual cheese festival./Arnold and the gang clean up a vacant lot so that they can have a baseball field.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Meet the Odd Parents: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won’t take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: While on their way to a sports coliseum, Daggett annoys the bus driver who accidentally drives the bus through a hole in the fabric of space and time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dinklescouts/I Dream of Cosmo: Timmy wishes Mr. Dinkleberg would replace Dad as Squirrely Scout leader. Dad tries to regain Timmy’s respect and his leader position. Cosmo has amnesia and thinks he’s Dad’s genie.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Helga tries to hide her disappointment at not being invited to Rhonda's makeover party. She gives herself her own makeover and crashes the party with the neighborhood boys in tow, trying to out girlie-girl everyone else at the party.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. The only problem is, she accidentally goes to the wrong French restaurant.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Helga has been secretly building a shrine in her closet to Arnold. She has been collecting his combs, old school photos, used band-aids and chewing gum, but only one thing will make the shrine complete: Arnold's hat.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When it looks like Otto will make the cover of Gnarly Surf Magazine, Reggie is angry because the photographer doesn't think girls can surf.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts!/Timmy makes magic "You Doo" dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Full Moon/Ms. Pataki, Student-Teacher: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it''s a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. The gang all worry that Arnold will snitch.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: TV's Adam West, star of the superhero series "Catman," never had a real childhood. Timmy wishes that Adam could become a kid again. / Timmy wishes Cosmo and Wanda were Tootie's birthday fairies for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The boys return from tour and find Jo flirting with a hot new guy, new kids hanging out at the pool, and loads of schoolwork! With the second leg of their tour starting soon, will life in LA return to the way it was?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The guys have been having a little too much fun living in Hollywood and after getting charged again for breaking stuff at the Palm Woods and Gustavo has had enough and makes them get jobs!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys accidentally destroy the tape of the new Big Time Rush episode they were supposed to give the network. Needing a replacement episode the guys decide to make a blooper show which Stephen Glickman and Ciara Bravo host.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The boys are tired of sharing a ride and get money to buy a car, but all goes bananas when Drake buys an orangutan named Bobo instead.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Drake's new girlfriend might be tougher than him. Josh trying to impress Mindy's parents might be even tougher. Will the boys prevail, or will girl power rule the day?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The guys all chase the same girl, causing problems in the band for the first time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: BTR is making a cameo on a popular kid’s TV show, but Carlos’ pursuit of the show’s teen star puts him and Kendall in the crosshairs of her evil stage mother. Logan & James battle Yo Gabba Gabba over their amazing snack table.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time and Josh is sure that this year, his is the project to beat. But when Mindy Crenshaw makes a surprise return, sparks fly in the most unexpected places.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Big Time Invasion: BTR has to stop the invasion of the British boy band! Concerned that Gustavo is spread too thin, the boys try to hire a top music manager. Unable to agree, the four split and a rift quickly escalates within the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Sky Whale - Part 1: Babe and Kenzie's school project, Sky Whale, becomes an accidental viral video game hit, until rap star Double G comes to collect his share of the profits.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Gustavo starts an all-girl pop group, sparking jealousy from the guys.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The boys return from their world tour and are now famous at the Palm Woods, but they just want to get settled and focus on girls. Griffin tries to bribe Carlos to pick his favorite song for the boys’ upcoming radio interview.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: The Game Shakers haven't been getting along. Dub recommends they see his office therapist: Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: After Trip solicits romantic advice from Babe for an alleged friend named Chuck, she comes to suspect that Trip has a crush on her, and tries her hardest to avoid an awkward work situation.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Griffin is pitching a line of BTR merchandise to the CEO of Selmart, but the boys hate the products. Taking matters into their own hands the guys crash the meeting and accidently get their music banned from Selmart stores.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: After a botched weightlifting routine, Josh injures his toe and is forced to the hospital. Drake wants nothing to do with this until a bodacious young nurse catches his eye.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys are pitched a kids cartoon show but instead do a video game to expand their brand. A mix-up while wearing motion capture suits puts them at the center of an extraterrestrial news story.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: A toy company hires Game Shakers to make a game based on a toy that they're not allowed to see.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Josh and Drake both get a job at the Movie Theater and works toward the coveted assistant manager position.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 115
programme.desc: The Game Shakers work to finish creating a new game. But Dub's hoping to score a duet with a famous singer and pushes her nightmare step-grandson on them.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: When pop star Kayla Batch hires The Game Shakers to make a lifestyle game, she invites Babe to join her elite squad while Kenzie is left on the outs.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The most popular kid in school is throwing what may be the greatest sixteenth party ever, but Drake and Josh may be having cake for two after they get banned from the party.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are suspicious of Trip's new fame-hungry girlfriend and are determined to find out if she's using him to get closer to Double G.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers sign up for the restroom-sharing app Air TnP, one of their customers sabotages their new game with a virus, and the kids have to figure out a way to undo the damage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 120
programme.desc: The Game Shakers visit a mummy exhibit. Hudson accidentally snaps off one of its fingers. Babe leads a quest to glue it back on without getting caught.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo’s got them working on a Christmas EP, and won’t let them go home until it’s done.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Trip becomes depressed after losing a big video game battle to a 7-year-old.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The boys have the fight of all fights and decide to move out. James ends up squatting in a cool retiree’s apartment, Logan moves into a place right by the water, Carlos builds a cardboard house, and Kendall must fix things.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Jordin Sparks is staying at the Palm Woods while she records a new song with Gustavo. The guys are told to stay away from her because they are bad luck...

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jo’s publicist wants the press to think she’s dating her new co-star, so Kendall and Jo must sneak around and hide their relationship!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s time again for the prank war at the Palm Woods, and this time it's kids versus adults as they battle for the honor of winning Lord Prankington’s Cup.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mrs. Hayfer needs a house sitter and it's the boys to the rescue, but all doesn't go according to plan when they meet Tiberius, a vicious dog with an appetite for..Drake & Josh?!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The guys are not thrilled with their boring apartment at the Palm Woods and hatch a plan to improve it when Gustavo creates a fun 'fake' living area for them on a soundstage for an upcoming EPK shoot.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The boys are scheduled to make their first TV appearance, but when it looks like BTR will be bumped from the line-up, they do whatever it takes to make their debut happen.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lucy releases her revenge album about Kendall and it becomes a huge hit! James, desperate for attention, creates a rumor that he and Cher Lloyd are recording a duet, and Carlos gets bad press after he appears to hit an old lady.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake decides that he and Josh are going to be the first to ride the Demonator, the fastest and scariest rollercoaster opening tomorrow at Mystic Mountain.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When a crime show decides to film reenactments at the Premiere, fantasy and reality collide as Josh uproariously finds himself cast as the lead. San Diego's most wanted Movie Bandit!

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Drake wins a free skydive off a helicopter and goes off to do it despite his parents saying no. Josh, being the good brother he is, tries to stop him, but ends up going along for the ride.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 220
programme.desc: A failed hacking attempt and blackmail put the Game Shakers' big deal with Clam Jumper in jeopardy.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The record company CEO thinks adding a fifth band member will broaden Big Time Rush’s appeal and sticks the guys with a self-proclaimed 'bad boy', who tries to inject dissension and tension within the group.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Drake and Josh are left in charge for the weekend and quickly exhaust their funds and turn the house into a bed and breakfast as a source of income.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A six-year-old argument between Drake and Josh is suddenly rekindled when their conflicting accounts of a incident at a San Diego Padres game finds them each placing the blame on the other.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The guys are visited by their hometown friend who happens to be an awesome singer, but also the world’s biggest klutz! At the same time, James is visited by a fan whose behavior quickly turns from complimentary to stalker.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In our season finale, Drake and Josh go on the Dr. Phyliss Show and relive some of their most outlandish moments. Some will jab at your funny bone, while others will tug on your heart strings.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Lost Jacket, Falling Pigeons: When Dub gives the girls bonuses for Sky Whale's success, Babe buys herself a fancy new jacket. But she is crushed when she loses it. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: Shark Explosion: Triple G's mom Jackie invites the kids on her yacht. But she and Double G have doubled booked the yacht, causing the pair to compete for the kids' affection. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: James' mom, nicknamed the "Estee Lauder of the Midwest" for her successful cosmetics line, arrives at the Palm Woods to bring James home and groom him to take over the family company.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's Aunt Catherine's wedding day, and Drake and Josh are in charge of picking up the cake. But their wedding plans get crashed when their car breaks down.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: After Bellview High nerd, Eric Blonnowitz accidentally punches Drake he finds a newfound world of fame, popularity and girls.
